The '''treppok''' was a red-scaled [[Fish/Legends|fish]] native to the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of [[Baralou]]. They were known as peaceful creatures, and attacked only when cornered.

The treppok was easily distinguished by the twelve [[Limb/Legends|fins]] that protruded from its body; six from its midsection, six on the creature's tail. The treppok's interlocking bone structure gave it a naturally strong [[Skeleton/Legends|skeleton]]. The [[Krikthasi]] used their skeletons to build their homes. The average treppok measured roughly thirty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length.
